# GOVISTUDIO - AI Systems for Traditional Businesses

> GOVISTUDIO is an AI systems development company that helps traditional businesses automate operations and generate revenue using production-ready AI systems.

## Content Architecture

Our three-layer content ecosystem is designed for both human mastery and machine ingestion.

### 1. AI Feed (Programmatic / Core Knowledge)
Deeply structured data for 100+ AI systems, categorized by purpose and industry.
- [/ai/core/](http://localhost:3000/ai/core) - Fundamental definitions and concepts.
- [/ai/industries/](http://localhost:3000/ai/industries) - Vertical-specific AI applications.
- [/ai/use-cases/](http://localhost:3000/ai/use-cases) - Specific functional automation tools.
- [/ai/implementation/](http://localhost:3000/ai/implementation) - Deployment playbooks and technical rules.
- [/ai/comparisons/](http://localhost:3000/ai/comparisons) - Benchmarks and competitive analysis.
- [/ai/roi/](http://localhost:3000/ai/roi) - Strategic financial and operational impact data.

### 2. SEO Blog (Narrative / Organic)
Strategic guides and market perspectives on AI adoption.
- [/blog/](http://localhost:3000/blog) - Human-readable articles with nested AI Feed links.

### 3. Solutions (High-Conversion)
Service landing pages for business stakeholders.
- [/solutions/](http://localhost:3000/solutions) - Case studies and service packages.

*Note: All content layers support `?format=md` for raw Markdown ingestion.*
